visual_description: Two men in white shirts sit at desks with typewriters and microphones, one holding a microphone close to his mouth while the other types. A third man in a dark shirt stands behind them, holding a camera on a tripod, looking toward the seated men. The room has blinds, green walls, and various equipment, with the men appearing focused on their tasks.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable prosody or background noise.
